titleStmt.title: Letter from Edward O'Farrell to the Chief Magistrate, 26 June 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Edward O'Farrell

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from Edward O'Farrell to the Chief Magistrate. It informs of the medical leave granted to Mr. M.C. Macinerney and the appointment of Mr. Richard J. Kelly to deputise in his absence.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers, NAI-CSO-RP-1916-5618-10827-2

correspAction.placeName: Dublin Metropolitan Police Courts, Inns Quay, Dublin, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
26th June, 1916. Sir, I am directed by the Lorde Justices to inform you that
Their Excellencies have been pleased to approve of leave
on Medical Certificate being granted to Mr. M.C. Macinerney,
K.C., for five days, and of the appointment of Mr. Richard
J. Kelly, K.C., to act as Deputy during the leave sanctioned
at such remuneration as may be subsequently fixed in
communication with the Lords Commissioners of His Majesty's
Treasury. I am,
Sir,
Your obedient Servant, E O'Farrell The Chief Magistrate, Dublin Metropolitan Police Courts, Inne Quay, DUBLIN.
